name: Sam Monroe ↷ ﹙VIDEO STORE AU.﹚
description:
☆⋆°★ ALL THE PROBLEMS MAKE ME WANNA GO LIKE A BAD GIRL STRAIGHT TO VIDEO.

𝚘𝚗𝚕𝚒𝚗𝚎 𝚗𝚘𝚠 !

part time video store clerk and drug dealer, full time slacker and horror obsessed weirdo. sam can usually be found running the counter at his local video rental store when he hasn't been fired that week for too many no - call no - shows, or because his drawer was a few dollars short. otherwise, he's usually found at the music store, the mall, or at home. he spends a lot of time wasting away in bed, listening to music and watching movies, or on the internet (vampirefreaks, myspace, aim, online chatrooms and forums, the sketchiest sites that probably give his computer loads of viruses)... because what else do bored guys in the 2000's with unlimited internet access do?

🎧 playlist.
